title: Design System: 双边关系看板

bg.usage: Page background behind all dashboard panels.

panel.usage: Cards, chart panels, explanation panels, notices, and method sections.

text.usage: Primary text, selected segmented controls, and strong UI labels.

muted.usage: Secondary explanatory text and utility labels.

blue.usage: Relationship semantic color, links, chart emphasis, and cool state accents.

red.usage: Warnings, errors, and warm relationship semantic emphasis.

hot-red.usage: High relationship index, improving segments, and warm cards.

header.usage: Soft deep blue-gray product cover header start color, separating the entry area from the white dashboard panels without a harsh solid block.

header-muted.usage: Subtitle and secondary live-status text on the dark header.

headline.purpose: Page title only. Keep fixed at product scale.

body.purpose: Explanations, method copy, and report summaries.

motion.rule: Motion conveys state only: hover, focus, selection, loading, and content update.

componentNotes.relationshipCard: Clickable repeated card with 8px radius, white surface, compact country pair, index value, delta, and sparkline.
componentNotes.brandMark: Intersecting double-circle logo from the logo concepts file. Warm red circle represents one relationship actor, cool blue circle represents the other, and the overlap represents the bilateral relationship.
componentNotes.topbar: Soft deep blue-gray product cover header using a restrained gradient, white title, #d4deea supporting text, double-circle brand mark, and a compact live-status badge.
componentNotes.trendChart: Signature data component. Prioritize 50 neutral line, selected turning segment, current score, date readability, and frameless in-chart color semantics above the 100 line. Typography is limited to four roles: Title for the chart title, Data for the core score, Body for controls, and Caption for axes, legend, segment values, tooltips, and reading notes. Red means improving or friendlier, blue means worsening or tenser, and mobile needs a direct current-segment path to the explanation panel.
componentNotes.explanationPanel: Reading panel for the selected trend segment. Keep the selected segment heading, main event, evidence, and reports in one coherent brief.
componentNotes.methodBox: Trust and limitation section. Keep available but secondary.

dos: Keep the interface product-first and reader-first.
Use semantic color with text labels.
Improve beauty through proportion, rhythm, and clarity.
donts: Do not make it look like an intelligence operations screen.
Do not make it feel like a financial trading terminal.
Do not add generic AI-style card stacks, decoration gradients, or nested cards.
Do not use color as the only state cue.
